response:
sec. 1  
people allergic to peanuts cannot live underwater because their bodies react to the protein in peanuts  
the immune system of people allergic to peanuts produces antibodies that trigger an allergic reaction  
the reaction can cause severe symptoms such as difficulty breathing and swelling of the throat  

sec. 2  
the inability to live underwater is due to the body's natural response to allergens  
the reaction is a protective mechanism to prevent further exposure to the allergen  
the body's response is a sign of the immune system's overreaction to a harmless substance
